entries.title: RT Mada Seghete: Re @swyx and I are curating the AI in GTM track at @aiDotEngineer on June 30. The thing every AI engineer must realize: GTM just beca...
entries.summary: RT Mada Seghete Re @swyx and I are curating the AI in GTM track at @aiDotEngineer on June 30. The thing every AI engineer must realize: GTM just became an engineering problem. Outbound = agent design. Enrichment = retrieval + data quality. Attribution = a knowledge-graph problem. Forecasting = evals.

entries.title: As AI gets better, it reveals an empty promise
entries.summary: This week we've got tandem hands-ons with Google's new Gemini AI agent - Spark - from my colleagues David Pierce and Jay Peters. Their takeaways are similar: It's so effective that it's scary. Spark knew that David's dog is named Frida and knew the first name of Jay's wife, even though neither of them explicitly […]

entries.title: Congrats to the @googlegemma team on the Gemma 4 12B launch 🎉 Day-0 support on vLLM is ready to go. It's an encoder-free unified multimodal model ...
entries.summary: Congrats to the @googlegemma team on the Gemma 4 12B launch 🎉 Day-0 support on vLLM is ready to go. It's an encoder-free unified multimodal model — text, image, audio, and video all project straight into the LLM's embedding space, no separate vision or audio towers. 256K context, built-in thinking, native tool calling. entries.title: Coralogix raises $200M on bet that someone needs to watch the AI agents
entries.summary: Coralogix is among a growing number of infrastructure firms betting that as AI systems move into production, demand will rise for tools that can monitor their behavior, troubleshoot failures, and provide the operational data needed to keep them running reliably.

entries.title: ChatHealthAI: Aligning Electronic Health Record Representations with Large Language Models for Grounded Clinical Reasoning
entries.summary: arXiv:2606.02802v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit strong natural-language reasoning abilities for clinical decision support, but struggle to effectively model structured longitudinal electronic health records (EHRs). In contrast, EHR foundation models can learn predictive patient representations, yet lack interpretable language-based reasoning. To bridge this gap

entries.title: Traj-Evolve: A Self-Evolving Multi-Agent System for Patient Trajectory Modeling in Lung Cancer Early Detection
entries.summary: arXiv:2606.02812v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Modeling patient trajectories from longitudinal electronic health records (EHRs) requires reasoning over sparse, noisy, and long-context multimodal sequences. Existing LLM-based multi-agent systems address context length but process patients in isolation, failing to mirror how clinicians leverage accumulated experience from similar prior cases. We pr

entries.title: RT 哥飞: Notion 为了拥有 .com 域名，来换掉之前的 .so 域名，甚至愿意出让部分股权给.com 域名拥有者。 现在，大家可以用 https://notion.com 来访问 Notion ...
entries.summary: RT 哥飞 Notion 为了拥有 .com 域名，来换掉之前的 .so 域名，甚至愿意出让部分股权给.com 域名拥有者。 现在，大家可以用 https://notion.com 来访问 Notion 了。 好域名，尤其是自己的品牌域名，品牌方是一定会心心念念要拿下来的。 对于 .com 的持有者来说，能够拿到一点点 Notion 的股份，绝对比一次性拿现金更好。 补充一下，实际这件事情发生在 2018 到 2019 年，也就是那时候 .com 域名就已经被 Notion 拿到了，但实际上线使用是最近的事情。 最近还有另一个域名的故事，也挺有意思的。 知名绘画软件 http://Paint.net 原先官网域名是 http://GetPaint.net ，这些年为了拿下 http://Paint.net ，软件开发者 Brewster 做了很多努力，都不奏效。 结果好死不死，http:/

entries.summary: 虽然很多人吐槽 Opus 4.8，但是写 Mac App UI 真的强，Claude Design 设计出来，用 Opus 4.8 去实现，还原度相当不错。 感觉我要发布一个 Mac App for X 了 宝玉: Cursor 在为用户增加使用额度。最近我重度使用了 Cursor 的 Agent，效果相当不错。我常用的 GUI Agent 里面，Codex App > Cursor > Claude Desktop。 几个亮点： 1. 它的 multitask 模式可以开启多个后台任务并行，速度很不错。 2. 它可以灵活选择各种模型，不像 Codex 和 Claude Code
